title: Scroll bars in automations
excerpt: Automations need to have scroll bars.  I’ve got several automations which monitor incoming email in Outlook, generate items and route them to the right boards/groups.  I have a lengthy (>60) list of email addresses which…

posts.author: mcdemon (M.McD)
posts.cookedHtml: Automations need to have scroll bars. I’ve got several automations which monitor incoming email in Outlook, generate items and route them to the right boards/groups. I have a lengthy (>60) list of email addresses which are evaluated in a “When a new email arrives” automation. When I try to edit this list, it is presented without a scroll bar and the only way to see all of the steps in the automation is to zoom out to the point where the list is unreadable. I have to cast it to a 60" display in portrait mode just to edit it. This is a huge issue which needs to be resolved.
